title: New Features Webinar today!

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi guys,

Just a quick reminder that we have a New Features webinar today.

@Juda will be hosting you for a tour around the following features:

  1. Updates to the Workspaces and Boltswitch
  2. Some amazing Board updates including the new Board Filter (beta), adjusting item height, Timeline improvements, subitems exports
  3. Dashboard improvements like Goal App widget, our adorable holiday llamas
    and a full section devoted to the improvements to the Custom Automation Builder, allowing for subitems support and adding multiple actions for each trigger.

Book your spot here ->> https://monday.zoom.us/webinar/register/9716081219669/WN__Lfj97gORSS8Xz9IF2OHeA

See you there!!

posts.author: Eda6195 (Emily Anderson)
posts.cookedHtml: Do you know when we will be able to filter the goal widget as im hoping to use it to show me what work dollar value is booked this week on my all time open jobs board but at the moment without being able to filter it im getting the dollar value all time

posts.author: storme (Storme)
posts.cookedHtml:
How can I use the Goal App Widget on formula coloums for example total sales (from online and in store).

Thanks
Storme
